Class TreeDragOverEventArgs

Provides data for the OnDragOver(ITree, TreeDragOverEventArgs).

Inheritance
object
EventArgs
TreeDragOverEventArgs
Inherited Members
EventArgs.Empty
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)

object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()
Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public class TreeDragOverEventArgs : EventArgs
Remarks

This event is raised when dragged data enters or moves within the bounds of the ITree control.

The subscriber should:

  • Validate the dragged Data.
  • Inspect the target location using TreeHitTestData.
  • Evaluate KeyState to determine user intent.
  • Assign an appropriate value to Effect.

Setting Effect to None prevents dropping.

Constructors

TreeDragOverEventArgs(IDataObject, int, TreeHitTestData, DragDropEffects, DragDropEffects)

Initializes a new instance of the TreeDragOverEventArgs class.

Declaration
public TreeDragOverEventArgs(IDataObject data, int keyState, TreeHitTestData hitTestData, DragDropEffects allowedEffects, DragDropEffects effect)
Parameters
Type Name Description
IDataObject data

The data being dragged.
int keyState

The current state of SHIFT, CTRL, ALT keys and mouse buttons.
TreeHitTestData hitTestData

Information about the node and location under the cursor.
DragDropEffects allowedEffects

The drag-and-drop operations allowed by the source.
DragDropEffects effect

The current target drop effect.

Gets the drag-and-drop operations allowed by the source.

Property Value
Type Description
DragDropEffects
Remarks

The subscriber must assign a value from DragDropEffects to indicate the intended operation.

KeyState

Gets the current state of the SHIFT, CTRL, ALT keys and mouse buttons.
